item.title: Pardon the selfie - But I just wanted to share my joy
item.description: Trigger Warning: Talk about suicide Picture to the left is two years ago. Picture to the right is today. Two years ago, my life was miserable. I was very overweight, the dysphoria had become completely unbearable and I could no longer pretend to be something I wasn't. For me, dysphoria and thoughts about being born wrong was with me since my earliest memories. I struggled through a traumatic puberty, and tried to cure myself from something that can't be cured. I tried to be what the world wanted me to be. Two years ago, I was at a crossroads. Either be try to be myself in the world, or not be at all. I moved from the mountain village where I worked, closer to home and family, but still in a fairly large city. I started working two jobs, losing 35 kg and brought in enough capital to buy an apartment. Four months ago, I started hormone treatments, and I see a little progress every month. I no longer need wigs. My face no longer grows facialhair from a year and a half of laser. My body is starting to change to reflect what my brain was always wired for. My name is Kristianne. I have a wonderful girlfriend named Siri, who only sees the woman I am. I have new and wonderful friends. I have reconnected with old friends who have now met the real me. And, I'm mending the fractured bond I had with my family. I am a teacher to adult immigrants who need help to integrate. I am an aunt to three wonderful children. I am a big sister to three adult siblings, who should have been there for them all the time, but I am there now. I feel like I'm actually living, and not just surviving. I can feel again. I am no longer a husk. If you struggle with what I did. Take a chance. It won't fix all of your problems, of course. But, it might give you the surplus needed to start living fully and vibrantly. I still feel dysphoria, but it's less than before. I am only 4 months into the medical process and I am waiting for surgeries. But, just this hope, this chance, to spend the one and only life I have as myself. That is everything. Love you all. I love this community!
item.dc:creator: Krascara

item.title: Basal Cell Carcinoma
item.description: Get your weird growths checked no matter how small!! What was once a little speck that had been growing slowly over the 1st 10 years and has been doubling in size for the last 7ish was removed yesterday. I’d seen 3 different dr’s over the years to ask what the hell it was and each of them said “it was nothing to worry about.” Finally during Covid my current dr. noticed it and sent me to an ophthalmologist. Ophthalmologist decided to do a biopsy and I found out it was Basal Cell Carcinoma and had to be removed. That dr couldn’t remove it himself as it involved my tear duct and I was sent to see 2 different specialists. 1 to remove the cancer and an oculoplastic surgeon rebuild it. I was awake for both procedures. 1st day was a Moh’s procedure. Basically they freeze the area and then cut away the cancer and then send to pathology while I wait. They check the margins and if there’s still cancer cells they cut a little more until it’s all gone. 2nd reconstruction procedure was a lot more involved and really intense. The surgeon who performed the procedure is apparently the best in western Canada so I’m super hopeful that my eye lids will still function properly and won’t look too messed up. TL:DR skin cancer on your eyelid is brutal, get your little growths checked!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Over a year ago, I posted this stupid meme when it all started. Today, we launched the book.
item.description:
Old meme is cringe, long live new meme.
Today we released the PDF version and we're shipping the physical book from next week. Shameless plug, you can order a copy from our website if you want: https://palaeogames.com/ Take a look at some of our art, if you'd like:
These illustrations are by Mark Witton. He's a pretty cool guy. This is Balaur - watch out for its dual sickle claws.
One of our custom playable races, the Manyhorn. Specifically, a Barbarian, Conan style!
We added a bunch of holistic environments too. These are Beipiaosaurus in the chilly mountains of the Yixian Formation. Who said dinosaurs can only be in Aztec-themed jungles?
It has been a very strange year for me. I have the same hair style as Michael here too.
item.dc:creator: Palaeo

item.title: A collected list...
item.description:
They all look like their moms dressed them so they could go out and play. You can still hear her yelling at them to bring up their dishes from the basement before they leave.
I'm sure there's more but this is a good start. (originally posted by @amipretty on 2022-12-04 18:54:26)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Some things do get better
item.description: This is me. Some days it’s hard to keep going. Some days it’s nearly impossible to keep the depression and darkness at bay. But she… she is what keeps me going. I can’t do this without her. I can’t fathom losing her. I can’t exist in a world where she isn’t here with me. I have to be her. Have to pursue her. Have to do everything in my power to keep her. Because for once in my life I found something worth fighting for. And she is everything to me. Apologies for the selfies, it’s not something I normally post. But I’m finding I don’t hate my face anymore. Not like I used to. And that’s… that’s a nice change. Most Viral Edit: You all have made me feel so special. I've genuinely cried reading your comments. Would that my own family and some of my oldest friends were as welcoming and accepting. For everyone out there struggling, for the trans men and women and non-binary folx, never hesitate to reach out to me. I can't promise I'll be able to make the pain go away, but I can weep over it with you.

item.dc:creator: nicilaskin

item.title: Normalize personal growth for the sake of growth
item.description: So, around three years ago, I decided to follow up on a desire of mine to learn a second language. I picked Swedish. I don't have much rationale behind it, beyond the fact that it's relatively close to English and I wanted to learn it. So, I did it. I'm not perfectly fluent but I can hold a fairly basic conversation and read it somewhat well. I still practice; watching Swedish shows/movies, reading Dagens Nyheter and other Swedish newspapers, etc. However, whenever I bring up the fact that I know Swedish, people always seem confused as to why I picked it. I know it's none a common second language in America like Spanish or a popular world language (also like Spanish or) like Mandarin but I chose to learn it and find myself always having to answer questions about why I want to. People also seem confused when I know topics about science or history and don't have degrees in the matter. I don't think it should be odd to be well-versed in topics and not necessarily pursue an education in it, beyond one conducted on your own.
item.dc:creator: LincLoud

Also I have seen reindeer so I know they're real.
no.
mood
six chins
This would explain a lot, actually.
:3
Oh no.
You think that's bad? Scots Gaelic has "Saor" which means "Free" as in Speech (Saor Alba) and "Cheap" (Leann Saor). Free (as in Beer) is "An Asgaidh".
What do you think Chat.
You will use the rotary dial.
OwO
This is what sleeping is like for me ;__;

item.title: Wedding Catwoman Cosplay
item.description:
SnarkyJayCosplay here, wanted to share my cosplay of Catwoman in her wedding dress (as seen in Batman 50). Every other cat in this edit is ALSO me! Clearly I have a problem.
This is the original art featuring other variations of Catwoman.
Here’s a composite by my amazing friend BriLanImagery— those two photos were taken separately and he combined them in such a cool way.
And this is the reference I sent him. Even though the wedding never happened, all the art out of it was absolutely gorgeous. I still love BatCat and I worship Selina Kyle.

item.title: I devote this dump to my wife so I can close tabs, pt. 21
item.description:
And take your meds. It's my experience that most suffering is slightly less bad when you're hydrated, as opposed to dehydrated.
Just make sure you burn them AFTER you cross them. Otherwise you're going to have a much harder time crossing that gap.
I wonder what platypus meat tastes like... I could have a platypus steak and eggs breakfast! Surely someone's done this already, yes?
Absolutely. I like fresh strawberries. I can't stand almost ANY strawberry-flavored food or beverage. It's just not the same!
Because... calories and cutting tools are necessary for survival? And the latter makes it easier to consume the former.
I was... somewhere(?) and someone said the past tense of "yeet" should be "yept." I think the internet needs to come to some sort of consensus on what we're doing with that word, or if it's just going to have multiple conjugations, or what. Discuss!
I need to try to remember this one. But, also: could this meeting have been an email? That's a chin-stroker right there.
I cannot STAND having cut hair in my shirt. If I were designing hell, that would be an aspect of it.
It's a poor sort of craftsman who blames his tools. Come at me, bro!
It's ok to be eggy. I love you anyway.
That's... why I'm here.
I saw this with the sound off the first time, and immediately knew what the sound would be when I turned it on. Definitely wasn't disappointed!
I always draw a blank when it comes time to tell a joke. I think I'm going to try to keep this one in my back pocket for the future.
I'm in this picture. I am both the furby and the fire.
This is a beautiful sentiment.
This bird is on a high-protein diet. Think of the GAINS!
Eh, I'm sure it'll be fine.
Cue the mariachi music!
NOOOOOO! Someone get it some water or something!
I'm going with 'A'.
I can't tell if the little beard is knit or made from candy. Either way, it's adorable.
And now Santa's a crab
The void might be experiencing a break from reality. Please be patient with the void braincells that did decide to show up.
Kissinger's dead and Dolly Parton is still literally kicking. Sometimes things are ok for a little while.
"Time to burn this whole damn company to the ground." I think to myself as I sit comfortably at my desk, unmoving except to eat another chip.
Bring it on, you jumpy fuck! I'm not afraid of you!!
How could you possibly think this was a good idea...?
See, now... THIS is a good idea.
I like to groove and boogie!
Subs, not dubs for the King.
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: The cutest old man in the world, Kirby
item.description:
This is Kirby, my best friend. Kirby is 8 years old now! As a veterinary student, it is my life goal to make his life as enjoyable and as long as possible. I'd be lost without him. He is the perfect study buddy. As you may notice, Kirby did not approve of his winter shoes.
He has spunk and will tell you how he feels
Blep
Such a dapper gentleman
He knows how to bow
The picture of refinement
Kirby has a healthy respect for cats. Bug secretly loves him
The puppy days!
A young Kirby, very sassy
Who needs personal space?
I call this his army cut. Basically I just trim the scruff up during the summer
Liv the cat doesn't approve of dogs. Thanks for looking at my dog Kirby, the cutest dog in the entire world, just like all dogs.
